questions.question: You are running a WLC for a WLAN. You want to allow for guests to be segmented to the guest VLAN. What is the simplest implementation you can configure on the WLC?
choices: Access control lists for one SSID
Two SSIDs, one configured to the production VLAN and another configured to the guest VLAN
Access control lists for two SSIDs
questions.explanation: A simple guest segmentation design uses separate SSIDs mapped to production and guest VLANs.
